news.summary: Gualberto Hernandez has been appointed as the new CFO of PriceSmart, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSMT) following the retirement of Michael McCleary. The announcement was made on May 9, 2025, in San Diego. Hernandez will assume the role of Executive Vice President and CFO at the Company.

news.summary: Clarke Inc. reported a net loss of $2.4 million for the first quarter of 2025, compared to a net income of $2.4 million for the same period in 2024. This loss was mainly due to a pension expense resulting from past service costs recognized after a pension plan amendment. However, the company saw an increase in comprehensive income year over year, reaching $5.4 million in 2025 due to remeasurement gains on pension plans. The book value per common share increased by $0.21, primarily due to after-tax remeasurement gains on the pension surplus of $5.4 million. Hotel and rental revenue increased to $17.7 million in 2025 compared to $14.6 million in 2024. Other important figures included an income tax recovery of $0.9 million, depreciation and amortization of $2.9 million, and hotel net operating income of $4.9 million. The company's book value per common share at the end of the quarter was $20.06, while the common share price was $22.67.
news.headline: Clarke Inc. reported a net loss of $2.4 million for Q1 2025, contrasting with a $2.4 million net income in Q1 2024. Comprehensive income rose due to changes in pension plans, with other comprehensive income recorded at $5.4 million. Book value per common share increased by $0.21 to $20.06, while the common share price was $22.67. Hotel and rental revenue increased to $17.7 million from $14.6 million in 2024. Other figures can be found in the company's Management's Discussion & Analysis for Q1 2025.

news.summary: Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. has extended its deadline to June 11, 2025, by depositing $874.78 into its trust account. The funds were sourced from a $180,000 convertible promissory note issued to Scilex Holding Company. The note does not accrue interest and will be repaid upon the initial business combination or the company's liquidation. Upon the business combination, Scilex can convert the note into Denali's Class A ordinary shares at $10.00 per share. The remaining $57,795.52 from the note is available for future one-month extensions if needed for the completion of a business combination.
news.headline: Denali Capital Acq. extends deadline to June 11, 2025, depositing $874.78 via convertible note with Scilex for biz combo at $10/share; $57,795.52 remaining.

news.summary: Steak ‘n Shake is making a move into the world of cryptocurrency by announcing plans to accept Bitcoin at all of its locations starting on May 16. The restaurant chain, owned by Biglari Holdings, currently has over 450 locations globally, with 436 in the United States. The decision to accept Bitcoin follows several other moves by the company to target specific groups of American consumers. Steak ‘n Shake tested engagement for Bitcoin payments with a tweet in March that received over a million views and caught the attention of Bitcoin supporter Jack Dorsey. The company aims to make the cryptocurrency available to its more than 100 million customers. Several restaurants have previously accepted Bitcoin payments, typically for a limited time and at select locations through partnerships with companies like Flexa.
news.headline: Steak 'N Shake to accept Bitcoin at all locations starting May 16, embracing MAGA culture and Tesla fanbase. Over 450 locations globally.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in five years. Overall, these indicators point towards a strong and growing economy, providing hope for continued financial stability and prosperity for many.

news.summary: Democratic senators have raised concerns about US President Donald Trump's ties to cryptocurrency exchange Binance, accusing him of potential conflicts of interest in regulating the industry. The senators asked for reporting on Binance's steps in a 2023 plea agreement with US authorities, where they paid over $4 billion, with then-CEO CZ stepping down. Trump has been accused of corruption for profiting from crypto while influencing laws, launching his own memecoin earning millions in fees. His family-backed venture recently announced a $2 billion investment using Binance's stablecoin. The senators' letter came after blocking a vote on the GENIUS Act to regulate stablecoins, with Senator Elizabeth Warren opposing it due to concerns about Trump's involvement in crypto. Around 40% of Trump's net worth is tied to crypto, raising conflict of interest alarms. Binance CEO CZ applied for a federal pardon from Trump. The concerns hint at insider trading and conflict of interest with Trump's crypto ventures.
news.headline: US senators raise concerns over Trump-Binance ties, ask DOJ, Treasury for details on $4B settlement amid conflicts of interest in regulating industry. Senators block GENIUS Act to regulate stablecoins, citing Trump corruption concerns. Reports suggest 40% of Trump's net worth linked to crypto. Former Binance CEO applies for federal pardon from Trump. Magazine raises conflict of interest, insider trading questions regarding Trump's crypto ventures.

news.summary: Google's artificial intelligence system is now identifying potentially deceptive notifications to safeguard Android users from fraudulent tactics. This advanced technology aims to prevent users from being misled by suspicious alerts or messages received on their devices. By utilizing AI algorithms, Google intends to enhance the security of its users and reduce the risk of falling victim to scams. This system has successfully flagged a significant number of suspicious notifications, highlighting the effectiveness of AI in combatting online threats and ensuring a safer user experience for Android users.
news.headline: New AI system in Chrome detects scam notifications on Android to prevent deceit, safeguarding users.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are showing bullish momentum as institutional inflows rise, regulations favor, and ETF demand surges. Important price gains: Bitcoin at $103,210.29 (+1.9%), Ethereum at $2,342.42 (+13.3%), Solana at $171.91 (+7.4%), XRP at $2.35 (+4.9%), Dogecoin at $0.2044 (+7.4%), Shiba Inu at $0.00001503 (+7.4%). Notable stats: Large transaction volume up by 3.8%, daily active addresses growing by 1.2%, transactions over $100,000 increased from 10,628 to 14,818, exchanges netflows down 129.9%. Coinglass data shows 250,199 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $1.04 billion. Crypto whales boosted holdings to $3.7 billion in the last 30 days. Developments include Coinbase launching 24/7 Bitcoin and Ethereum futures trading, analysts anticipating higher crypto prices in Q2, and Mark Cuban criticizing memecoins for setting a bad example.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency markets bullish over the weekend with Bitcoin at $103,210.29 (+1.9%), Ethereum at $2,342.42 (+13.3%), XRP at $2.35 (+4.9%), Dogecoin at $0.2044 (+7.4%). Large transactions up 3.8%, daily active addresses up 1.2%. Transactions >$100,000 increased from 10,628 to 14,818. 250,199 traders liquidated in last 24 hours for $1.04B. Whales accumulating, boosting holdings to $3.7B in 30 days. Coinbase launches 24/7 Bitcoin, Ethereum futures trading. Mark Cuban criticizes memecoins.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Pia Mellody, a renowned author, speaker, and innovator in trauma, codependence, and addiction recovery, peacefully passed away in her Colorado residence at the age of 82. The news of her death was confirmed on May 9, 2025. Mellody's contributions in these fields gained her international recognition, and she was surrounded by her loved ones during her final moments.
news.headline: Renowned trauma and codependence expert Pia Mellody dies at 82 in Colorado, surrounded by family.
